consensus: MuchaNipo replay harness reduces manual regression review by 25% in 2026. 한국어 토큰 중첩 검증은 근거 문장과 핵심 주장을 비교한다.
recommendations: Adopt the replay harness for every eval-agent regression run.
Keep recent council reports in JSONL so failures can be reproduced.
dissent: The replay set must stay small enough for local pytest runs.
